name: chaser-lite
description: Cut the cost of Claude Code: audit the tokens wasted on every turn and shrink the system prompt (context diet). 100% local, zero cloud, zero dependencies. Free and deliberately capped — the full version, ~5x more developed (multi-model orchestration engine, tamper-proof Merkle journal, semantic cache, long-term memory, real-time Cockpit, Security Shield), is Chaser Pro: chaser-orchestrator.com/en.html
